# 📇 Google Contacts App (Clone)

A modern **Google Contacts-inspired web application** built with React.
This app allows users to manage contacts with features like create, edit, delete, and persistent storage.

---

## 🔗 Live Demo

👉 https://google-contacts-app.vercel.app

---

## ✨ Features

* 🔐 Login system (basic authentication)
* 📋 View all contacts
* ➕ Create new contact
* ✏️ Edit existing contact
* 🗑️ Delete contact
* 💾 Data persistence using **localStorage**
* 🖼️ Auto-generated profile images
* 🔔 Toast notifications (success/error feedback)
* 📱 Responsive design (mobile-friendly)

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

* **Frontend:** React (Vite)
* **Styling:** Tailwind CSS + DaisyUI
* **Routing:** React Router
* **State Management:** useState / props
* **Notifications:** React Hot Toast

---

## ⚙️ Installation & Setup

### 1. Clone the repository

```
git clone https://github.com/EiSandyPhyo/google-contacts-app.git
cd google-contacts-app
```

---

### 2. Install dependencies

```
npm install
```

---

### 3. Run the development server

```
npm run dev
```

---

### 4. Build for production

```
npm run build
```

---

## 💡 Key Learning

* Managing state in React
* Handling forms and validation
* Working with localStorage for persistence
* Routing with React Router
* Deployment (Rewrite Rule 404 error handle) using Vercel

---

## 🚀 Future Improvements

* 🔍 Search contacts
* 🔤 Sort contacts (A–Z)
* 🌙 Dark mode

---

## 👥 Contributions

This project was partially developed as a group project.

* 🎨 **UI design and some layout components** were created collaboratively with two team members.
* 💻 **Core functionalities** were implemented independently by me, including:

  * Create contact
  * Edit contact
  * Delete contact
  * Toast notifications
  * Local storage data handling
  * Form validation and logic

This allowed me to focus on the application logic and user interaction while collaborating on the overall design.
